title: stelis citrinella
intro: Stelis citrinella, also known as Lemon Cinnamon Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis citrinella include its potential to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, the leaves are used in herbal preparations to create remedies for various ailments.
